Medical

The only health app that keeps your medical history completely private—on your device, offline, with no accounts or tracking. Store your complete health record: conditions, medications, prescriptions, allergies, lab reports, surgeries, and more. Scan documents with AI, track symptoms, set reminders, and manage up to 6 family members. 7-day free trial. Then pay once, use forever—no subscriptions, no ads. Your health. Your data. Your control.

Pranav Shirole

Maker

@daria\_goroshko1 Hi Daria, great question! All document scanning and text recognition (OCR) happens 100% on-device using Apple's built-in Vision framework — nothing is ever sent to a server or third-party AI. The scanned images and extracted text are stored locally with full file-level encryption (iOS Complete File Protection). There's no cloud processing, no analytics, and no network calls at all.

Report

Harini Mukesh

This is cool I downloaded and tried your app… Just wondering will the medical data I am sharing with the app stay private or it will be shared with any AI to create the health analytics ?

results.title: Healsens Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.9

Based on 10 reviews

Review Healsens?

Reviewers see Healsens as a thoughtful preventive-health app with strong design, clear implementation, and practical value. They especially like its focus on using personal medical data to make guidance feel more relevant, and they praise its use of official sources. The main reservations are specific rather than broad: one reviewer questions whether all recommended tests should be done within the suggested timelines in some countries, and another asks how user security and private health data are protected. Overall, feedback is positive but attentive to medical and privacy details.

This is a very well-designed app and a product that truly adds value. In a world where preventive medicine is more and more relegated to second plan and we are left to fend for ourselves, constantly impacted by generic "medical" information that might or might not apply directly to our individual case, Healsens is a breath of fresh air because it uses your own medical data to give you that input. It's truly a game-changer!

# Docus.ai Reviews

### The community submitted 7 reviews to tell us what they like about Docus.ai, what Docus.ai can do better, and more.

5.0

Based on 7 reviews

Review Docus.ai? [...] 5.0

Based on 7 reviews

Review Docus.ai?

Docus.ai is praised for its user-friendly design and robust features, making it a valuable tool for improving patient care. Users appreciate the convenience of obtaining quick health insights and expert verification from home. The AI Health Assistant's ability to integrate medical records and provide personalized recommendations is highlighted as particularly helpful. The platform's customization options and attachment function are also well-received. Overall, Docus.ai is recognized for enhancing efficiency and the quality of care, with users recommending it to others.

results.title: My Juno Health: AI Doctor: Smarter Health. Sharper Mind. Reach Your Peak Productivity | Product Hunt
results.content:
Lina Huchok

@savitri\_sagar Love that you’re making accuracy and empathy go hand-in-hand! The transparency piece really resonates, knowing where advice comes from and that it’s doctor-reviewed is huge for user confidence. Good luck!

Savitri Sagar
My Juno Health: AI Doctor

My Juno Health: AI Doctor

@lina\_huchok

Thank you! 🙏 We truly believe accuracy means more when it’s paired with empathy — healthcare isn’t just about answers, it’s about how those answers are delivered. Transparency and doctor review have been core to our build from day one, so hearing that it resonates means a lot. 💙

David Lusk
My Juno Health: AI Doctor

My Juno Health: AI Doctor

@lina\_huchok  @savitri\_sagar dawning a brave new world.

Prem Sarojanand
My Juno Health: AI Doctor

My Juno Health: AI Doctor [...] My Juno Health: AI Doctor

@lina\_huchok

Thank you! That’s such an important question.

The biggest challenge has been striking the right balance between clinical precision and human warmth. We’ve addressed this by co-developing with physicians, so every AI insight is both medically validated and context-aware.

On trust, yes — we conducted in-depth user research and found that people feel most confident when AI advice is transparent (citing credible sources), reviewed by real doctors, and delivered in a tone that feels supportive, not robotic. For us, accuracy and empathy go hand-in-hand — that’s where true patient confidence is built.

Lina Huchok [...] My Juno Health: AI Doctor

@lina\_huchok Thank you! The biggest challenge is balancing AI precision with a human touch. We address this by training our models with physician oversight and real-world case reviews, ensuring accuracy while preserving empathy in tone. For trust, our research shows transparency, explainable recommendations, and clear physician validation make users far more confident engaging with AI healthcare tools.

Kishan Umretiya
My Juno Health: AI Doctor

My Juno Health: AI Doctor

@lina\_huchok Thank you! Biggest challenge was balancing accuracy with empathy — solved by training on physician-reviewed data and refining tone through feedback. For trust, research showed transparency, clear explanations, and easy doctor access make all the difference.

Bhavya Arora
Kandid
